answers.where: I am back on the Frost Keep path after an Avalanche Reset, with Frost Shards banked and the Keep rooms buried again.
answers.action: Fight monsters for Frost Blocks, then rebuild Gate, Forge, and Campfire again.
answers.response: Avalanche Reset converted Keep Rank into Frost Shards and restarted the repair chain cleanly.
answers.reward: Frost Shards persist after reset, so the next rebuild has permanent progress to spend.
answers.game_look: Bright snowy RPG scene, readable HUD, visible Keep progress panel, monster fight, and one dominant rebuild CTA.

next: Spend Frost Shards through a cleaner shard-upgrade UI and add stronger reset animation/audio.
